mapper.insert:
select lpad((coalesce(max(substring(doc_detail_seq, 1, 5)::integer), 0) + 1)::text, 5, '0') as docDetailSeq from esg.tb_ohs_corractive_action_request WHERE write_year = #{writeYear} AND doc_type = #{docType} AND doc_seq = #{docSeq}
INSERT INTO esg.tb_ohs_corractive_action_request( write_year, doc_type, doc_no, doc_seq, doc_detail_seq, comp_id, write_dt, req_dt, nonconformities, measures, validate, required, final_check_dt, use_yn, created_at, created_by ) VALUES( #{writeYear}, #{docType}, #{docNo}, #{docSeq}, #{docDetailSeq}, #{compId}, #{writeDt}, #{reqDt}, #{nonconformities}, #{measures}, #{validate}, #{required}, #{finalCheckDt}, #{useYn}, now(), #{createdBy} );
mapper.select: SELECT car.*, tarr.orgn_id, toi.orgn_nm, axp.audit_nm, CASE WHEN taiw.signature IS NOT NULL THEN 'Y' WHEN taiw.hr_id IS NULL THEN 'C' ELSE 'N' END AS approvalStatus FROM esg.tb_ohs_corractive_action_request car LEFT JOIN esg.tb_audit_result_report tarr ON tarr.write_year = car.write_year AND tarr.doc_no = car.doc_no AND tarr.doc_seq = car.doc_seq LEFT JOIN esg.tb_orgn_info toi ON toi.orgn_id = tarr.orgn_id LEFT JOIN esg.tb_audit_execution_plan axp ON axp.write_year = car.write_year AND axp.doc_no = car.doc_no LEFT JOIN esg.tb_approval_info taiw ON taiw.target_type = 'OCAR' AND taiw.target_id = car.write_year || car.doc_no || car.doc_seq || car.doc_detail_seq AND taiw.param = 'writer' WHERE car.comp_id = #{compId} AND car.write_year = #{writeYear} ORDER BY car.use_yn DESC, doc_no DESC
